title: Govandi residents raise complaints with BMC for non-commencement of pre-monsoon desilting work
description: Lawyer Abdi Abas Sayyed, a Govandi resident, highlighted the non-commencement of pre-monsoon desilting work and submitted that the BMC has not started desilting work in wards 134, 136, 137, 138, 139, 140 and 141
